name: LLM Smoke Test
description: Sends a fixed text prompt through the internal LLM pool (provider="internal", bound to the in-cluster inference router via `internal_pool_router`) and surfaces the response. Verifies the executor's LLM backend → router → Ollama integration end-to-end. Uses `llama3.2:1b`, the small/fast model pulled by default `just dev` and seeded `loaded` in the pool, so the smoke test runs out of the box without a heavy 9B download. Requires `just dev` (managed Ollama + model runner + inference router).
